messages.content: add an event to sort a column, how to sort an wxgrid when clicking a column

You can convert the if-else statement into a ternary operator expression as follows:

```cpp
year = isFinishYear ? game.GetFinishYear() : game.GetStartYear();
```

This ternary operator statement assigns the value of `game.GetFinishYear()` to `year` if `isFinishYear` is true, otherwise it assigns the value of `game.GetStartYear()` to `year`.

You can condense the if-else statement into one line using the ternary operator:

```cpp
return (year > 0) ? wxString(std::to_string(year)) : wxString();
```

This single line of code returns a `wxString` object containing the `year` value if it is greater than 0, and an empty `wxString` otherwise.
i got an error at if (sortDirection[col]) error: passing 'const std::map<int, bool>' as 'this' argument discards qualifiers [-fpermissive]|
you gave me the same code as I told you before, give me an alternative to solve this error not copying the same code I posted before

Apologies for misunderstanding your request. To resolve the error without capturing `sortDirection` by reference, you can use a `const_cast` to remove the const qualifier on the captured `sortDirection` map. However, note that `const_cast` should be used with caution, as it can potentially lead to undefined behavior if misused.
